chunks.text: ORDER SHEET I N T HE HI G H CO U R T O F S I N DH B E N C H AT S U K K U R C. P No. D – 2057 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.8098/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.8099/2025 (Ex.A) 4. For hearing of main case 09.12.2025 Mr. Zafar Ali Dhari, Advocate for the Petitioners >>>>>>>>>..<<<<<<<< Through the instant Constitutional Petition, the Petitioners seek directions against Respondent No.2, Deputy Inspector General of Police, Sukkur, for appointment of a police officer of CSP rank to conduct reinvestigation of FIR No. 52 of 2025 registered at Police Station Patni, District Sukkur, for offences under Sections 324, 504, 148 and 149, PPC. We have examined the memo of petition as well as the documents placed on record. It is an admitted position that the Petitioners have an alternate and adequate remedy before the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace under Sections 22-A and 22-B, Cr.P.C., which they have not invoked. Instead, they have directly approached this Court under its writ jurisdiction. In view of the availability of an efficacious alternate remedy, the instant Constitutional Petition is not maintainable. Accordingly, the same is dismissed in limine along with all pending applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
